text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Ah well—this is only to be expected.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Claw machines are heavily luck based. It seems
Lady Luck wasn't in your favor this time.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'll find something else, so don't get too hung up
over this.
